title: POV: A Tiny Dream Gets a Guardian
description: A gentle original CERBERRA micro-short dedicated to every little light brave enough to dream past the dark. Private-first release, original visuals and music, safety-reviewed before public publishing.
review_required: Watch full video on mobile before publishing.
If primarily child-directed, set Made for Kids correctly before public release.
Do not add comment bait or sales links if Made for Kids.
Confirm original audio and visuals are acceptable.
note: The binary MP4 package was generated in the ChatGPT sandbox and provided to the operator for manual upload. This manifest records the library asset metadata in GitHub.
